org.springframework.data.expression.ValueExpressionParser

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.expression
Value Expression implementation.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

    Description
    static ValueExpressionParser
    ValueExpressionParser.create()
    Creates a default parser to parse expression strings.
